notes: Actionable: yes. The implication asks the engineer to 'name the bhoga-aiśvarya-gati each cycle produced — the promo, the launch, the headline number — and check whether your sense of real engineering work has narrowed to that loop.' Reproducible: a manager can run this on a 1:1 with their senior. Testable predicate (3.11): the diagnostic is 'did your definition of real engineering work narrow to fit the demo-week slide pipeline?' That can be checked against the engineer's actual recent work portfolio. The verse does not dismiss promo work; it asks for honest naming of what the cycle is. PASS for both 7.3 and 3.11.
